heading: Acceptance of donations
label: 5027a Acceptance of donations
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 2009section 6101(a) of Pub. L. 111–13section 4950 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment note under .Oct. 1, 2009section 6101(a) of Pub. L. 111–13section 4950 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), an entity receiving assistance under this subchapter may accept donations, including donations in cash or in kind fairly evaluated, including plant, equipment, or services.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: An entity receiving assistance under this subchapter to carry out an activity shall not accept donations from the beneficiaries of the activity.
